description_long: This is a plush reindeer toy with a round, tan-colored body and limbs, featuring a large red nose and two black eyes set on a simple, friendly face. The reindeer has two prominent brown antlers and large, rounded ears. It wears a white scarf around its neck and a festive plaid-patterned outfit in shades of green, red, and white, adorned with a green ribbon bow at the front. The toy's limbs are stubby and soft, giving it a cuddly and approachable appearance. The overall texture appears soft and fabric-like, with visible stitching along the seams.
description: A soft, tan plush reindeer toy with a red nose, brown antlers, white scarf, and a festive plaid outfit with a green bow.
description_view_0: Front view showing the reindeer's face, red nose, black eyes, white scarf, plaid outfit, and green bow.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, antler, ear, and the roundness of the body and limbs.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the rear of the head, both antlers, ears, and the full plaid pattern on the back of the outfit.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile of the head, antler, ear, and the side of the green bow.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and friendly, with two small black eyes and a large red nose. There is no visible mouth, giving it a simple, calm appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with both arms and legs slightly spread, head facing forward, and antlers upright.
